title: Viridi Energy Completes First Sale of Section 48 Tax Credits from Magnolia RNG Project
content: Viridi Energy, a Warburg Pincus-backed renewable natural gas platform, announced the successful sale of its first Section 48 Investment Tax Credits tied to its Magnolia Landfill RNG project in Baldwin County, Alabama. This milestone demonstrates Viridiâ€™s ability to monetize tax credits to accelerate clean energy investments. Proceeds will support methane capture and conversion to pipeline-quality RNG, delivering environmental and economic benefits while supplying low-carbon fuel for U.S. transportation. Advisors included Mickelson & Co. as broker and Hogan Lovells for legal counsel. Viridi plans further RNG projects leveraging Section 48 credits.
author: Analysts Account
